case_title: STEVEN E CROW VS. OHAD COHEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. HOUSEMATE OHAD COHEN TOLD ME THAT YOAV MOVED BACK TO HIS COUNTRY AND IS NO LONGER IN UNITED STATES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROW, STEVEN E AS TO DEFENDANT ASHKENAZI, YOAV

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROW, STEVEN E IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COHEN, OHAD ASHKENAZI, YOAV CASE AGAINST YOAV ASHKENAZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF STEVEN E. CROW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OHAD COHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YOAV ASHKENAZ IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO DEFENDANT YOAV ASHKENAZ. MR. COHEN STATES TO THE COURT THAT MR. ASHKENAZ IS NOT LONGER LIVING IN THE UNITED STATES, AND PROOF OF SERVICE HAS NOT BEEN FILED AGAINST MR. ASHKENAZ. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
